scripts.build:css: mkdir -p app/assets/builds && sass --load-path=app/assets/stylesheets app/assets/stylesheets/application_base.scss:app/assets/builds/application.base.css --no-source-map && sass --load-path=app/assets/stylesheets app/assets/stylesheets/application_tail.scss:app/assets/builds/application.tail.css --no-source-map && cat app/assets/builds/application.base.css app/assets/stylesheets/slate.css node_modules/select2/dist/css/select2.css node_modules/select2-bootstrap-theme/dist/select2-bootstrap.css node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css node_modules/leaflet.markercluster/dist/MarkerCluster.css node_modules/leaflet.markercluster/dist/MarkerCluster.Default.css node_modules/billboard.js/dist/theme/graph.css app/assets/stylesheets/direct_uploads.css app/assets/builds/application.tail.css > app/assets/builds/application.css
